mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, role, real_name, department_id, phone, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{realName}, #{departmentId}, #{phone}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, role = #{role}, real_name = #{realName}, department_id = #{departmentId}, phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, role, real_name, department_id, phone, create_time FROM user ORDER BY id ASC
